_note: vol-01 전체 영어화 (ch1+part2+part3 병합, 소스 정합 검증 통과).

sentences.text: Gimje, on an autumn night — a place where the sky settles down close to the earth.
sentences.ko: 김제, 가을밤. 하늘이 가까이 내려앉는 곳.

sentences.text: Oh, look up there, Hara. The Cowherd and the Weaver have met again tonight.
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 아이고, 저기 좀 봐라 하라야. 견우랑 직녀가 오늘도 만났네.
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: Wow… they really are close. It feels like I could reach out and touch them.
sentences.ko: 하라: 와… 진짜 가깝다. 손 닿을 것 같아요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: That's right. The sky over Gimje has long been famous for its clear, starry nights.
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 그렇지. 김제 하늘이 옛날부터 별이 잘 보이기로 유명했단다.
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: Grandpa, did you know? The Greeks call those very stars by completely different names.
sentences.ko: 하라: 할아버지, 그런데 그거 아세요? 그리스 사람들은 저 별을 완전 다른 이름으로 불러요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Oh? Is that so? What do they call them?
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 오호, 그래? 뭐라고 부르는데?
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: Altair and Vega — the Eagle and the Lyre.
sentences.ko: 하라: 알타이르랑 베가요. 독수리랑 거문고래요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: One star, yet everyone names it differently. The sky is so generous.
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 별은 하나인데 사람마다 부르는 이름이 다르지. 하늘이 참 너그러워.
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: That star had definitely been there yesterday.
sentences.ko: 분명히 어제는 있던 별이었다.

sentences.text: Yesterday's photo and today's show the exact same spot, but…
sentences.ko: 하라: 어제 찍은 거랑 오늘 거랑 같은 자리인데…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Huh? Wait a second. There were three stars right here.
sentences.ko: 하라: 어? 잠깐만. 여기 별 세 개 있었잖아.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: One… two… where did the other one go?
sentences.ko: 하라: 하나… 둘… 어디 갔지?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Is something wrong with my camera? No — yesterday's photo is perfectly clear.
sentences.ko: 하라: 카메라가 이상한가? 아니, 어제 사진엔 또렷한데.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Can a star really vanish overnight…?
sentences.ko: 하라: 별이 하룻밤 사이에 사라질 수가 있나…?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The next day, Ms. Kim, a curator from the Byeokgolje Agricultural Museum, came to the school.
sentences.ko: 다음 날, 학교에 벽골제 농경문화박물관 학예사 김 선생이 찾아왔다.

sentences.text: Hello, everyone. I'm from the Byeokgolje Agricultural Museum.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 여러분, 안녕하세요. 벽골제 농경문화박물관에서 왔어요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: Today I'll tell you about the 1,500-year-old star map painted on our museum ceiling.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 오늘은 우리 박물관 천장에 그려진 1500년 전 별자리 이야기를 들려줄게요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: The people of Baekje also looked up at the night sky and gave the stars names.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 백제 사람들도 밤하늘을 올려다보면서 별 이름을 붙였답니다.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: Wow, 1,500 years ago? And that painting is still there?
sentences.ko: 친구: 우와, 1500년 전이요? 그 그림이 아직 남아 있어요?
sentences.speaker: Classmate

sentences.text: Yes. The colors have faded a lot, but the shapes of the constellations are still clear.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 네, 색은 많이 바랬지만 별자리 모양은 또렷이 남아 있어요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: It's a story about the stars…
sentences.ko: 하라: 별 이야기다…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: But… actually, I have something rather strange to tell you today.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 그런데… 사실 오늘 여러분께 좀 이상한 이야기를 해야 해요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: This is a photo of the ceiling taken yesterday. You can see the constellations, right?
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 이게 어제 찍은 천장 사진이에요. 별자리 보이죠?
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: And this one was taken this morning, of the very same spot.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 그리고 이건 오늘 아침에 같은 자리를 찍은 거예요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: Huh? The stars… there are fewer of them?
sentences.ko: 친구: 어? 별이… 줄었어요?
sentences.speaker: Classmate

sentences.text: Maybe the conservation went wrong? Like the paint peeled off.
sentences.ko: 친구: 보존 처리 잘못된 거 아니에요? 물감이 벗겨졌다든가.
sentences.speaker: Classmate

sentences.text: Our conservation team checked all night. But once again, they couldn't find the cause.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 저희 보존팀이 밤새 점검했어요. 그런데 이번에도 원인을 모른대요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: It's almost as if the painting is disappearing on its own…
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 그림이 스스로 사라지고 있는 것 같아서…
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: Someone was erasing the same stars from both the sky above and the painting in the museum.
sentences.ko: 누군가 우주의 별과 박물관의 그림에서 같은 별을 지우고 있었다.

sentences.text: Wait… I've seen this somewhere before.
sentences.ko: 하라: 잠깐… 이거 어디서 봤는데.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The photo I took yesterday… where on earth did it go…
sentences.ko: 하라: 어제 찍은 내 사진… 어디 갔지…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: It's the same spot — the ceiling and the real sky.
sentences.ko: 하라: 같은 자리잖아. 천장이랑 진짜 하늘이랑.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The same stars are disappearing here, and up there too.
sentences.ko: 하라: 같은 별들이… 여기서도, 저기서도 사라지고 있어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: How can something like this be happening?
sentences.ko: 하라: 어떻게 이런 일이?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Grandpa, take a look at this — the museum ceiling and the sky we watched.
sentences.ko: 하라: 할아버지, 이것 좀 봐요. 박물관 천장이랑 우리가 본 하늘이랑요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The same stars are disappearing. I'm serious.
sentences.ko: 하라: 같은 별이 사라지고 있어요. 진짜로요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Hmm… if this is true, it's no ordinary matter.
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 흐음… 이게 사실이라면 보통 일이 아니지.
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: Hara, there's a story I heard when I was young.
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 하라야, 할아버지가 어릴 적 들은 이야기가 하나 있단다.
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: What kind of story?
sentences.ko: 하라: 어떤 이야기요?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: They said that somewhere on Moak Mountain, there is a place where time flows down.
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 모악산 어딘가에 시간이 흘러내리는 곳이 있다고들 했지.
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: The elders used to say that when stars vanish, you must begin your search from that very place.
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 옛 어른들은 별이 사라지면 그 자리부터 찾아야 한다고 하셨어.
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: A place where time… flows down…?
sentences.ko: 하라: 시간이… 흘러내리는 곳…?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: That evening, Hara climbed Moak Mountain.
sentences.ko: 그날 저녁, 하라는 모악산을 올랐다.

sentences.text: A place where time flows down… does a place like that really exist?
sentences.ko: 하라: 시간이 흘러내리는 곳이라니… 그런 데가 진짜 있어?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Still, I can't just sit and do nothing. The stars keep disappearing.
sentences.ko: 하라: 그래도 가만히 있을 순 없잖아. 별이 자꾸 사라지는데.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Huh? What is that light?
sentences.ko: 하라: 어? 저 빛은 뭐지?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: A blue light is leaking out from beyond the fog.
sentences.ko: 하라: 안개 너머에서 푸른 빛이… 새어 나와.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: My heart is pounding. I'm scared, but I keep wanting to go closer.
sentences.ko: 하라: 두근거리네. 무서운데 자꾸 가고 싶어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Inside the cave, someone was calling out to Hara.
sentences.ko: 동굴 안에서, 누군가 하라를 부르고 있었다.

sentences.text: It's a cave…
sentences.ko: 하라: 동굴이잖아…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The light is leaking out from deep inside. Could someone be in there?
sentences.ko: 하라: 빛이 안쪽에서 새어 나와. 누가 있는 건가?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Hello… is anyone there?
sentences.ko: 하라: 저기요… 누구 계세요?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Huh? That thing floating over there… is that a feather?
sentences.ko: 하라: 어? 저기 떠 있는 거… 깃털?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Thump, thump… even my own footsteps scare me. That blue light is getting closer and closer.
sentences.ko: 하라: 두근두근… 발소리도 무서워. 저 푸른 빛, 점점 가까워지고 있어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Wh-who's there? I know you're in there.
sentences.ko: 하라: 누, 누구야? 거기 있는 거 다 알아.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Hello? Sorry for startling you.
sentences.ko: 펜: 안녕? 놀라게 해서 미안해.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: For a long, long time, I have been waiting for you.
sentences.ko: 펜: 오랫동안, 정말 오랫동안 너를 기다렸단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Aaaah?! A-a quill… is talking?
sentences.ko: 하라: 으아아악?! 깃, 깃펜이… 말을 해?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Is this a dream? I'd better pinch my cheek. Ouch — it's not a dream!
sentences.ko: 하라: 꿈인가? 볼 좀 꼬집어 봐야겠어. 아얏, 안 꿈이네!
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: All right, let's start over with introductions. My name is Pen.
sentences.ko: 펜: 자, 인사부터 다시. 나는 펜이라고 해.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: I'm a magic quill that holds the very first page of Greek mythology.
sentences.ko: 펜: 그리스 신화의 첫 페이지가 깃든 마법 깃펜이지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: To be more precise, I'm a fragment of the Theogony, written by the poet Hesiod himself.
sentences.ko: 펜: 좀 더 정확히 말하면, 헤시오도스 할아버지께서 쓰신 『신통기』의 한 자락이란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: G-Greek mythology? He-Hesiod?
sentences.ko: 하라: 그… 그리스 신화? 헤, 헤시오도스?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: That's a name I saw in that thick book in the school library. And now that myth book's quill is spinning right in front of me…?
sentences.ko: 하라: 학교 도서관 그 두꺼운 책에서 봤던 이름이잖아. 그 신화책의 깃펜이 지금 내 앞에서 빙글빙글…?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Yes, that very book. By the look on your face, it seems you've heard the name before.
sentences.ko: 펜: 그래, 바로 그 책. 네 표정을 보니 이름은 들어본 모양이구나.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Look closely. These are the stars within the myth.
sentences.ko: 펜: 잘 봐. 이게 신화 속의 별들이야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: But you see it, don't you? One by one, they keep being blotted out into darkness.
sentences.ko: 펜: 그런데 보이지? 한 점, 두 점, 자꾸만 검게 지워지고 있어.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Someone is erasing the first page of the myth. If the beginning vanishes, every myth collapses.
sentences.ko: 펜: 누군가 신화의 첫 페이지를 지우고 있단다. 시작이 사라지면 모든 신화가 무너져 내리지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: That's why the stars are disappearing one by one — over Gimje's night sky and on the museum ceiling alike.
sentences.ko: 펜: 그래서 김제 밤하늘에서도, 박물관 천장에서도 별이 하나씩 사라지고 있는 거야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: So… that's what I saw last night?
sentences.ko: 하라: 그럼… 어젯밤 내가 본 게 그 일이었어?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The stars really were disappearing. There was nothing wrong with my eyes.
sentences.ko: 하라: 별이 진짜로 사라지고 있었구나. 내 눈이 이상한 게 아니었어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Just then, rainbow light came pouring down from the cave ceiling.
sentences.ko: 그때, 동굴 천장에서 무지개 빛이 쏟아져 내려왔다.

sentences.text: Wh-whoa… the ceiling is splitting open!
sentences.ko: 하라: 우, 우와… 천장이 갈라지고 있어!
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Oh dear, here comes that little troublemaker again, as noisy as ever.
sentences.ko: 펜: 어이쿠, 저 녀석이 또 요란하게 등장하는구나.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Helloooo! Ta-da, here I am!
sentences.ko: 이리: 안녀어엉! 짜잔, 등장이요!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Hey, Pen! You started without me again, didn't you? Left me out again!
sentences.ko: 이리: 야~ 펜! 또 너 혼자 시작했지? 나 빼놓고 또!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: You showed up late again. How long did you wander around this time?
sentences.ko: 펜: 너 또 늦게 왔잖아. 이번엔 얼마나 헤맨 거니?
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: I'm not late, okay? I'm just fast. You two are the slow ones!
sentences.ko: 이리: 늦은 거 아니거든? 내가 빠른 거지. 너희가 느린 거고!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Oh my, so this is the friend you mentioned? How exciting!
sentences.ko: 이리: 어머, 이 친구가 그 친구구나? 두근두근!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: …And who is this little one now? There's a rainbow shimmering over their head.
sentences.ko: 하라: …이 작은 애는 또 누구야. 머리에 무지개가 어른어른거려.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: W-wait… hold on! Both of you, stop for a second.
sentences.ko: 하라: 자, 자… 잠깐만! 둘 다 멈춰 봐.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Who in the world are you two? One at a time!
sentences.ko: 하라: 너희들, 도대체 누구야? 한 번에 한 명씩!
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Hm? Oh, I forgot, hehe. Hi, I'm Iri.
sentences.ko: 이리: 응? 아 깜빡했네, 헤헤. 안녕, 나는 이리야.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: I'm a young messenger who lays out the rainbow road. Nice to meet you!
sentences.ko: 이리: 무지개 길을 펼치는 어린 전령이지. 잘 부탁해!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: You can't even remember your own introduction, yet you brag about being fast.
sentences.ko: 펜: 자기 소개도 까먹는 주제에 무슨 빠른 척을 그렇게 하니.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Show-off quill! Try not to let your ink dry up~
sentences.ko: 이리: 잘난 척 깃펜! 잉크나 마르지 마세요~
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Phew… this is overwhelming.
sentences.ko: 하라: 후우… 정신없어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: All right, enough joking. Hara, listen carefully.
sentences.ko: 펜: 자, 장난은 여기까지. 하라, 잘 들어 줘.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: We have to travel all the way back to the beginning of mythology — before it's forgotten.
sentences.ko: 펜: 우리는 신화의 시작까지 거슬러 올라가야 해. 잊혀지기 전에.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: I'll lay out the rainbow road. Keep your footing firm, all the way down to your toes!
sentences.ko: 이리: 무지개 길은 내가 펼칠게. 발 끝까지 단단하게!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: But it's your feet that have to walk it, Hara. Can you do it?
sentences.ko: 이리: 대신 가는 건 하라 네 발이야. 할 수 있겠어?
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: I'm scared… but still.
sentences.ko: 하라: 무서운데… 그래도.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: If it's the only way to make the stars shine again, then I have no choice but to go.
sentences.ko: 하라: 별이 다시 빛나게 하려면, 갈 수밖에 없겠지.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: That's a good answer. Don't ever forget that feeling, all the way to the end.
sentences.ko: 펜: 좋은 대답이야. 그 마음, 끝까지 잊지 말아 줘.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Here, take my hand! This is really fast, you know.
sentences.ko: 이리: 자, 손 잡아! 이거 진짜 빠르거든.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: It might be dizzying at first, but don't close your eyes! If you let go of my hand, we're in big trouble.
sentences.ko: 이리: 처음엔 어지러울 수도 있는데, 눈 감지 마! 놓치면 큰일 나.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Wh-whoa! Wait, let me brace myself…
sentences.ko: 하라: 어, 어어! 잠깐, 마음의 준비를…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Lower your stance, and bend your knees a little.
sentences.ko: 펜: 자세 낮추고, 무릎 살짝 굽혀.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: H-here I gooo!
sentences.ko: 하라: 가, 간다아아!
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The rainbow road is a bridge connecting light and darkness.
sentences.ko: 무지개 길은 빛과 어둠을 잇는 다리.

sentences.text: Whoaaa… is this really the road to the world of myths?
sentences.ko: 하라: 우와아아… 이게 정말 신화로 가는 길이야?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: There's light beneath my feet. I feel like I'll fall, but I don't!
sentences.ko: 하라: 발 밑이 빛이야. 떨어질 것 같은데 안 떨어져!
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: It's a road that ordinary eyes cannot see.
sentences.ko: 펜: 보통 사람의 눈에는 보이지 않는 길이지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Because you're a child who watches the stars, you can see this road too.
sentences.ko: 펜: 너는 별을 보는 아이라서, 이 길도 보이는 거란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Keep your eyes on that thing at the far end. That's where we have to go.
sentences.ko: 이리: 저 끝에 보이는 거, 잘 봐 둬. 우리가 가야 할 곳이야.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: That… pitch-black thing? It keeps getting bigger.
sentences.ko: 하라: 저… 시커먼 게? 점점 커지는데?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: We're here. Keep your footsteps quiet too, Hara.
sentences.ko: 이리: 다 왔어. 발소리도 죽여, 하라.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: From here, the light will grow weak. Even the rainbow can't follow any farther.
sentences.ko: 이리: 여기서부터 빛이 약해질 거야. 무지개도 더는 못 따라가.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Steel yourself, Hara.
sentences.ko: 펜: 마음 단단히 먹어, 하라.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Because beyond this, there's nothing but darkness.
sentences.ko: 펜: 이 다음엔, 어둠밖에 없으니까.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Don't… let go of my hand. Okay?
sentences.ko: 하라: 손… 놓지 마. 응?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Right, I'll never let go. I promise!
sentences.ko: 이리: 응, 절대 안 놔. 약속!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Wh-where… are we?
sentences.ko: 하라: 여, 여긴… 어디야?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: I can't see my own hand. Only Pen's light, flickering on and off…
sentences.ko: 하라: 내 손이 보이지 않아. 펜의 빛만, 깜빡깜빡…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Quiet. Keep your breathing soft.
sentences.ko: 펜: 조용히. 숨소리도 작게.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: We've come deep in. Too deep.
sentences.ko: 이리: 깊이 들어왔어. 너무 깊이.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Before everything began, there was the deepest darkness — Chaos.
sentences.ko: 모든 것이 시작되기 전, 가장 깊은 어둠, 카오스.

sentences.text: Hara, take a good look.
sentences.ko: 펜: 하라, 잘 봐 두렴.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: This is where every story began.
sentences.ko: 펜: 여기가 모든 이야기가 시작된 곳이야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: The darkness… is breathing. It's alive.
sentences.ko: 하라: 어둠이… 숨을 쉬고 있어. 살아 있어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Pen, the light is too faint. What if we get discovered…
sentences.ko: 이리: 펜, 빛이 너무 작아. 우리 발견되면 어떡해…
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Now, what you're about to see… is the first page of mythology.
sentences.ko: 펜: 자, 지금부터 너희가 보는 게… 신화의 첫 페이지란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Hold your breath. You mustn't miss a single word.
sentences.ko: 펜: 숨을 죽이렴. 한 글자도 놓치면 안 돼.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: So we've come back… all the way to the very beginning.
sentences.ko: 하라: 처음으로… 처음으로 돌아온 거구나.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Can I hold your hand, big sister? It's so dark and I'm scared.
sentences.ko: 이리: 손 잡아도 돼, 누나? 깜깜해서 무서워.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Yes, hold on tight. I'm right here with you.
sentences.ko: 하라: 응, 꽉 잡아. 나도 같이.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Look, it's beginning! My toes are tingling!
sentences.ko: 이리: 봐, 시작이야! 발끝이 떨려!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Wh-where is it coming from? Above? Below?
sentences.ko: 하라: 어… 어디서 들리는 거지? 위? 아래?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: From every direction. Chaos has no inside or outside.
sentences.ko: 펜: 사방에서. 카오스는 안과 밖이 없으니까.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Something… is waking up.
sentences.ko: 하라: 뭔가… 깨어나고 있어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The very first to awaken was Mother Gaia.
sentences.ko: 가장 먼저 깨어난 것은, 어머니, 가이아였다.

sentences.text: Wow… her hair is like starlight!
sentences.ko: 이리: 와아아… 별빛 같은 머리카락이야!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Her eyes… are so warm.
sentences.ko: 하라: 눈이… 따뜻해.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: That is Gaia, the Mother of the Earth.
sentences.ko: 펜: 저분이 바로 대지의 어머니, 가이아시란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Hello, Darkness. You've waited a long time.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 안녕, 어둠아. 오래 기다렸지.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: From now on, let us live together.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 이제 우리는 함께 살아가자꾸나.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: From my hands, soil flows and grass springs up.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 내 손에서 흙이 흐르고, 풀이 돋는다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Fields are being born right out of her palms…
sentences.ko: 하라: 손바닥에서 들판이 태어나고 있어…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: This, right here, is the beginning of the Earth.
sentences.ko: 펜: 이게 바로 대지의 시작이란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Beneath Gaia's feet, in the deepest place of all, Tartarus split open.
sentences.ko: 가이아 발 아래로, 가장 깊은 곳, 타르타로스가 갈라졌다.

sentences.text: …I… am… the deepest… place.
sentences.ko: 타르타로스: …나는… 가장… 깊은… 곳.
sentences.speaker: Tartarus

sentences.text: Ugh, I can't even see the bottom…
sentences.ko: 하라: 으, 끝이 안 보여…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Tartarus is the deepest abyss. Once you're trapped, there's no escape.
sentences.ko: 펜: 타르타로스는 가장 깊은 심연이야. 한번 갇히면 빠져나오지 못해.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: What if we fall in, big sister?
sentences.ko: 이리: 떨어지면 어떡하지, 누나?
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Stay still. Let's not go near it.
sentences.ko: 하라: 가만히 있어. 가까이 가지 말자.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: And then rose a light — the love that draws all things together, primordial Eros.
sentences.ko: 그리고 솟아오른 빛, 만물을 끌어당기는 사랑, 원초의 에로스.

sentences.text: Hello! My name is Eros.
sentences.ko: 에로스: 안녕! 나는 에로스라고 해.
sentences.speaker: Eros

sentences.text: I'm the one who will bring you all close to one another.
sentences.ko: 에로스: 나는 너희를 서로 가깝게 할 거야.
sentences.speaker: Eros

sentences.text: Scattered stars, far-apart hearts — I'll connect them all.
sentences.ko: 에로스: 흩어진 별들도, 멀리 있는 마음도, 내가 이어줄게.
sentences.speaker: Eros

sentences.text: Wow, it's so warm! My heart is racing!
sentences.ko: 이리: 와아, 따뜻해! 가슴이 콩닥콩닥!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: So light can draw people together…
sentences.ko: 하라: 빛이 사람을 끌어당기네…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: I am Nyx, the goddess of night.
sentences.ko: 닉스: 나는 닉스. 밤의 여신이란다.
sentences.speaker: Nyx

sentences.text: I am Erebus, the deepest darkness.
sentences.ko: 에레보스: 나는 에레보스. 가장 짙은 어둠이지.
sentences.speaker: Erebus

sentences.text: We are the shadows born alongside the light.
sentences.ko: 닉스: 우리는 빛과 함께 태어난 그림자야.
sentences.speaker: Nyx

sentences.text: Darkness is a god too. It's not something to fear — it's rest.
sentences.ko: 펜: 어둠도 신이야. 두려운 게 아니라, 쉼이란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Rest…? Like sleep?
sentences.ko: 하라: 쉼…? 잠 같은 거예요?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Yes, child. When you close your eyes, I am there beside you.
sentences.ko: 닉스: 그래, 아이야. 너희가 눈을 감을 때 내가 곁에 있단다.
sentences.speaker: Nyx

sentences.text: Now, these here are my children.
sentences.ko: 닉스: 자, 이쪽은 내 아이들이란다.
sentences.speaker: Nyx

sentences.text: Hemera will bring the day, and Aether the clear light.
sentences.ko: 닉스: 헤메라는 낮을, 아이테르는 맑은 빛을 가져올 거야.
sentences.speaker: Nyx

sentences.text: Hello! I'll bring the morning to you every day!
sentences.ko: 헤메라: 안녕! 내가 매일 아침을 데려갈게!
sentences.speaker: Hemera

sentences.text: We'll be beside you each and every day.
sentences.ko: 아이테르: 우리가 매일 너희 곁에 있을게.
sentences.speaker: Aether

sentences.text: Wow! They're siblings, just like us!
sentences.ko: 이리: 와아! 자매구나, 우리처럼!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Night and day, one family… how amazing.
sentences.ko: 하라: 밤과 낮이 한 가족이라니… 신기해.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: We have all gathered here.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 우리 모두 여기 모였구나.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Darkness and light, depth and love, all in one place.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 어둠도, 빛도, 깊이도, 사랑도, 한자리에.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Now then, let us make the universe.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 자, 이제 우주를 만들어 보자꾸나.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Yes, Mother! I'll tie all the hearts together.
sentences.ko: 에로스: 좋아요, 어머니! 제가 마음을 이어드릴게요.
sentences.speaker: Eros

sentences.text: And I'll put them to sleep each night.
sentences.ko: 닉스: 나는 매일 밤 그들을 재울게요.
sentences.speaker: Nyx

sentences.text: Gaia… I think she just looked our way.
sentences.ko: 하라: 가이아가… 우리 쪽을 본 것 같아.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Really? Did she really see us? Hehe, yay!
sentences.ko: 이리: 정말? 정말 봤어? 헤헤, 좋아!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The gods in the myths can recognize the one who will tell their story.
sentences.ko: 펜: 신화 속 신은 자기 이야기를 들려줄 사람을 알아본단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: I'll write it all down so we don't lose a single word.
sentences.ko: 펜: 한 글자라도 놓치지 않게 기록하마.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Then we'd better listen carefully.
sentences.ko: 하라: 그럼 우리, 잘 들어야겠다.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: When one page of the myth returns, one star over Gimje returns as well.
sentences.ko: 신화의 한 페이지가 돌아오면, 김제의 별 하나도 돌아온다.

sentences.text: It worked! A star has come back!
sentences.ko: 하라: 됐어! 별 하나가 돌아왔어!
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Look, look, it's twinkling on the book!
sentences.ko: 이리: 봐봐, 책 위에서 반짝거려!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Every time we recover a page of myth, one star returns to the skies over Gimje.
sentences.ko: 펜: 신화 한 장을 되찾을 때마다, 김제의 하늘에도 한 별이 돌아온단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Ms. Kim, I wonder if you're watching…
sentences.ko: 하라: 김 선생님, 보고 계시려나…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: She's definitely watching!
sentences.ko: 이리: 분명히 보고 계실 거야!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Child, there you are.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 아이야, 거기 있구나.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Tell my story well.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 내 이야기를 잘 들려주렴.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Your voice will bring back the forgotten stars.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 너의 목소리가, 잊혀진 별을 되돌릴 거야.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Yes… I promise.
sentences.ko: 하라: 네… 약속할게요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The family of the first gods — the oldest beginning of all mythology.
sentences.ko: 첫 신들의 가족. 가장 오래된 신화의 시작.

sentences.text: Now, everyone gather together.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 자, 다 같이 한자리에.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Up on Mother's shoulder is the best spot!
sentences.ko: 에로스: 어머니 어깨 위가 제일 좋아요!
sentences.speaker: Eros

sentences.text: Hemera, Aether, come closer.
sentences.ko: 닉스: 헤메라, 아이테르, 가까이 오렴.
sentences.speaker: Nyx

sentences.text: Even shadows are part of the family.
sentences.ko: 에레보스: 그림자도 한 식구지.
sentences.speaker: Erebus

sentences.text: …I… from the deep… am here with you.
sentences.ko: 타르타로스: …나는… 깊은 곳에서… 함께한다.
sentences.speaker: Tartarus

sentences.text: Fate, Sleep, Death, and Dreams — all of them children of Nyx.
sentences.ko: 운명·잠·죽음·꿈. 모두 닉스의 아이들.

sentences.text: Shall I tell you more about my children?
sentences.ko: 닉스: 내 아이들 이야기, 더 들려줄까?
sentences.speaker: Nyx

sentences.text: Sleep and Dreams, Fate and Death — all were born here at my side.
sentences.ko: 닉스: 잠과 꿈, 운명과 죽음, 모두 내 곁에서 태어났단다.
sentences.speaker: Nyx

sentences.text: Yes please! Tell us, Lady Nyx!
sentences.ko: 펜: 네! 들려주세요, 닉스님!
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: I want to hear too!
sentences.ko: 하라: 저도 듣고 싶어요!
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Just go a little easy on the scary parts, hehe.
sentences.ko: 이리: 무서운 이야기는 살짝만요, 헤헤.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The children of Nyx are singing in the sky… how lovely they are.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 닉스의 아이들이 하늘에서 노래하는구나… 어여쁘기도 하지.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: But upon this wide earth, I wish I had a family shaped by my own hands.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 그러나 이 넓은 대지 위에, 내 손으로 빚은 가족이 있었으면 좋겠어.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Watch closely, Hara. Gaia can bear children even without a partner.
sentences.ko: 펜: 잘 봐, 하라. 가이아는 짝 없이도 아이를 낳을 수 있어.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: It's the power of Mother Earth — just as a sprout pushes up from the soil.
sentences.ko: 펜: 어머니 대지의 힘이지. 흙에서 새싹이 돋아나듯 말이야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Really? All by herself?
sentences.ko: 하라: 진짜로? 혼자서?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Shh! The song is starting.
sentences.ko: 이리: 쉿! 노래가 시작됐어.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The first child to rise above Gaia was Uranus, the god of the sky.
sentences.ko: 가이아 위로 솟아오른 첫 아이, 우라노스, 하늘의 신.

sentences.text: Whoaaa…
sentences.ko: 이리: 우와아아…
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The sky… was born in the shape of a person.
sentences.ko: 하라: 하늘이… 사람 모습으로 태어났어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Mother, I'll cover you over with stars.
sentences.ko: 우라노스: 어머니, 제가 어머니 위를 별로 덮어드릴게요.
sentences.speaker: Uranus

sentences.text: Blue by day, and deep dark-blue by night.
sentences.ko: 우라노스: 낮에는 푸르게, 밤에는 검푸르게요.
sentences.speaker: Uranus

sentences.text: Thank you, my first child.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 고맙구나, 내 첫 아이야.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: With you above me, the earth feels truly complete at last.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 네가 내 위에 있어 주니, 대지가 비로소 완성되는 것 같아.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: It's their first meeting as mother and son… so warm.
sentences.ko: 하라: 첫 모자 상봉이네… 따뜻해.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: These are Gaia's other children — the Ourea, the mountains, and Pontus, the sea.
sentences.ko: 펜: 가이아의 다른 아이들이야. 우레아, 산들, 그리고 폰토스, 바다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Wow! The mountains are really rising up!
sentences.ko: 이리: 와! 산이 진짜로 솟아나네!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: And the sea is surging up all at once!
sentences.ko: 이리: 바다도 한꺼번에 출렁이고!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: From one mother, the sky, the mountains, and the sea are all born.
sentences.ko: 하라: 한 어머니에게서 하늘, 산, 바다가 다 태어나는구나.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Yes. The great framework of the world was shaped by one person's hands.
sentences.ko: 펜: 그래. 세상의 큰 뼈대가 한 사람 손에서 빚어진 거야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Gaia and Uranus. When Earth and Sky joined hands, even more descendants were born.
sentences.ko: 가이아와 우라노스. 대지와 하늘이 손을 맞잡으니, 더 많은 자손이 태어났다.

sentences.text: This moment, when Earth and Sky meet, is the first bond that opens the age of the gods.
sentences.ko: 펜: 대지와 하늘이 맞닿는 이 순간이, 신들의 시대를 여는 첫 매듭이지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Take a good look. Even if the names are hard, you'll get used to them by learning one at a time.
sentences.ko: 펜: 잘 봐 둬. 이름이 어려워도 한 명씩 외우면 익숙해져.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Oceanus, Tethys, Hyperion, Theia…
sentences.ko: 펜: 오케아노스, 테티스, 히페리온, 테이아…
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: The youngest, Cronus… there's something different in his eyes.
sentences.ko: 하라: 막내 크로노스… 눈빛이 어쩐지 다르다.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Pen, is this child going to be the main figure of the next age?
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 이 아이가 다음 시대의 주인공이 되는 거야?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Just wait and see. It's always the youngest who ends up stirring things up.
sentences.ko: 펜: 두고 보렴. 막내가 끝내 일을 내는 법이지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Oooh~ Smells like foreshadowing~
sentences.ko: 이리: 호오~ 떡밥 냄새가 솔솔~
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Look — a little thunderbolt in the palm of my hand!
sentences.ko: 브론테스: 보렴, 손바닥 위의 작은 천둥!
sentences.speaker: Brontes

sentences.text: Mine can even shoot out like an arrow!
sentences.ko: 스테로페스: 내 건 화살처럼 쏠 수도 있지!
sentences.speaker: Steropes

sentences.text: These three are the blacksmiths who forge thunder and lightning.
sentences.ko: 펜: 이 셋은 천둥과 번개를 만드는 대장장이야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Far in the future, they'll forge the weapon of a certain young god.
sentences.ko: 펜: 먼 훗날, 어느 젊은 신의 무기를 빚어 주게 되지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Which god? What's his name?
sentences.ko: 하라: 어느 신? 이름이 뭐야?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: You'll meet him soon. I'll tell you his name then.
sentences.ko: 펜: 곧 만나게 될 거야. 이름은 그때 알려 줄게.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: See that? They can lift a whole mountain as if it were a cotton ball.
sentences.ko: 펜: 보이지? 산 하나쯤은 솜뭉치처럼 들어 올린단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: They're known as the strongest giant brothers in all of mythology.
sentences.ko: 펜: 신화에서 가장 힘센 거인 형제로 통하지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: What role will these brothers take on later?
sentences.ko: 하라: 이 형제들은 나중에 어떤 일을 맡게 돼?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Far in the future, you'll meet them again at a decisive moment.
sentences.ko: 펜: 먼 훗날, 결정적인 순간에 다시 만나게 될 거야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: And by then, the hands that lift mountains will have become the hands that protect the world.
sentences.ko: 펜: 그때는 산을 드는 손이, 세상을 지키는 손이 되어 있을 거고.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: More foreshadowing! Pen, you're doing it on purpose~
sentences.ko: 이리: 또 떡밥! 펜, 너 일부러 그러지~
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: All my children…
sentences.ko: 가이아: 내 모든 아이들…
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: The mountains, the sea, the thunder, and the hundred-handed ones — every one of them is beautiful.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 산도, 바다도, 천둥도, 백 개의 손도, 모두 어여쁘구나.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: They must all grow up safe and free.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 다들 안전하게, 마음껏 자라야 한다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: A mother's heart… is the same everywhere.
sentences.ko: 하라: 어머니의 마음은… 어디나 똑같구나.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The moment pride turns into fear — the first conflict in mythology begins.
sentences.ko: 자랑이 두려움으로 변하는 순간. 신화의 첫 갈등이 시작된다.

sentences.text: At first… I felt nothing but pride.
sentences.ko: 우라노스: 처음엔… 자랑스럽기만 했는데.
sentences.speaker: Uranus

sentences.text: That single eye, those hundred hands… they're far too strong.
sentences.ko: 우라노스: 저 외눈, 저 백 개 손… 너무 강해.
sentences.speaker: Uranus

sentences.text: What if a child I made takes my place?
sentences.ko: 우라노스: 내가 만든 아이가, 내 자리를 빼앗으면 어쩌지?
sentences.speaker: Uranus

sentences.text: Pen! The look in his eyes has changed!
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜! 아버지 눈빛이 변했어!
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: This is the moment pride turns into fear.
sentences.ko: 펜: 자랑이 두려움으로 바뀌는 순간이야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Those children's shoulders… are growing taller than mountains.
sentences.ko: 우라노스: 저 아이들의 어깨가… 산보다 커지고 있어.
sentences.speaker: Uranus

sentences.text: Lightning pours from their single eyes, and storms from their hundred hands.
sentences.ko: 우라노스: 외눈에서 번개가, 백 개의 손에서 폭풍이 나오는구나.
sentences.speaker: Uranus

sentences.text: When they grow up, they might take my sky from me.
sentences.ko: 우라노스: 자라면 내 하늘을 빼앗을지도 몰라.
sentences.speaker: Uranus

sentences.text: Pen, the look in Uranus's eyes… has turned cold.
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 우라노스 눈빛이… 차가워졌어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Fear has taken root deep in his heart.
sentences.ko: 펜: 두려움이 마음 깊은 곳에 자리 잡았구나.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Uranus's magic sent his strongest children down into the deep.
sentences.ko: 우라노스의 마법이 가장 힘센 아이들을 깊은 곳으로 보냈다.

sentences.text: You… shall sleep in the depths.
sentences.ko: 우라노스: 너희는… 깊은 곳에서 잠들거라.
sentences.speaker: Uranus

sentences.text: In a place no light can reach, without even a dream.
sentences.ko: 우라노스: 빛이 닿지 않는 자리에서, 꿈도 없이.
sentences.speaker: Uranus

sentences.text: My love, no! Those children are ours!
sentences.ko: 가이아: 여보, 안 돼요! 그 아이들은 우리 아이예요!
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Gaia, this is to protect the sky.
sentences.ko: 우라노스: 가이아, 이건 하늘을 지키는 일이오.
sentences.speaker: Uranus

sentences.text: Pen… my fingertips have gone cold.
sentences.ko: 이리: 펜… 손끝이 차가워졌어.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The six giants fell asleep deep within Gaia. The light was shut away.
sentences.ko: 여섯 거인은 가이아의 깊은 곳에서 잠들었다. 빛이 닫혔다.

sentences.text: …Mother…
sentences.ko: 브론테스: …어머니…
sentences.speaker: Brontes

sentences.text: Brother, my hands are growing heavy…
sentences.ko: 스테로페스: 형, 손이 무거워져요…
sentences.speaker: Steropes

sentences.text: I'm so sorry, my children.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 미안하구나, 내 아이들.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: I will surely come back for you. I promise.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 어머니가 꼭 데리러 갈게. 약속해.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: The light… is fading away.
sentences.ko: 하라: 빛이… 사라지고 있어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: They're only sleeping, Hara. Just sleeping.
sentences.ko: 펜: 잠든 거란다, 하라. 잠든 것뿐이야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Don't be afraid, Cronus.
sentences.ko: 레아: 무서워하지 마, 크로노스.
sentences.speaker: Rhea

sentences.text: Sister, did our brothers fall asleep too?
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 누나, 형들도 같이 잠든 거예요?
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Will Father… send us there too?
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 아버지가… 우리도 그곳에 보내실까요?
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Quiet. Father mustn't hear us.
sentences.ko: 오케아노스: 조용히 해. 아버지가 들으시면 안 돼.
sentences.speaker: Oceanus

sentences.text: What will we do when our turn comes…
sentences.ko: 테이아: 우리 차례가 오면 어떡하지…
sentences.speaker: Theia

sentences.text: Pen, the youngest is trembling the most, yet his gaze is steady.
sentences.ko: 이리: 펜, 막내가 제일 떨고 있는데 눈빛은 단단해.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: For the first time, Gaia's tears fell as rain.
sentences.ko: 가이아의 눈물이 처음으로 비가 되어 내렸다.

sentences.text: My children have fallen asleep deep within my heart.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 내 가슴 깊은 곳에서 아이들이 잠들었구나.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mountains, seas, and fields — please weep with me too.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 산도, 바다도, 들판도 함께 울어 다오.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Pen, it's raining… is this the first rain?
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 비가 내려… 이게 첫 비야?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Yes, Hara. A mother's sorrow is falling as rain.
sentences.ko: 펜: 그래, 하라. 어머니의 슬픔이 비가 되어 내리는 거란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: …Mother… where…
sentences.ko: 브론테스: …어머니… 어디…
sentences.speaker: Brontes

sentences.text: I can hear my children crying…
sentences.ko: 가이아: 내 아이들의 울음이… 들려.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: From deep, deep below, they're calling out in their sleep.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 깊고 깊은 곳에서, 잠든 채로 부르고 있어.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: A mother's love reaches all the way to the deepest place.
sentences.ko: 펜: 어머니의 사랑은 가장 깊은 곳까지 닿는단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Gaia, you look like you're in so much pain…
sentences.ko: 하라: 가이아, 너무 아파 보여요…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Gaia…
sentences.ko: 하라: 가이아…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: We're here. We'll stay by your side.
sentences.ko: 하라: 우리 여기 있어요. 곁에 있을게요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Gaia, is there any way we can help?
sentences.ko: 이리: 가이아, 우리가 도울 수 있을까요?
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Even something very small is fine.
sentences.ko: 이리: 아주 작은 일이라도 좋아요.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: When sorrow is at its greatest, even small hands become a great strength.
sentences.ko: 펜: 슬픔이 가장 클 때, 작은 손도 큰 힘이 된단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Gaia, will you just leave things as they are?
sentences.ko: 하라: 가이아, 이대로 두실 거예요?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: While your children are asleep down in the depths…
sentences.ko: 하라: 아이들이 깊은 곳에서 잠들어 있는데…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: No, Hara.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 아니다, 하라.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: A mother's sorrow soon becomes resolve.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 어머니의 슬픔은 곧 결심이 된단다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Soon the wind will change. Soon the light will return.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 곧 바람이 바뀔 거야. 곧 빛이 돌아올 거야.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Pen, the look in Gaia's eyes has changed.
sentences.ko: 이리: 펜, 가이아 눈빛이 달라졌어.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: What Gaia drew up from the depths was a golden sickle.
sentences.ko: 가이아가 깊은 곳에서 꺼낸 것은, 황금 낫이었다.

sentences.text: This sickle is a hard, radiant light that grew deep within the earth.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 이 낫은 대지 깊은 곳에서 자라난 단단한 빛이란다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: So that's… the golden sickle. A tool that opens the way to freedom.
sentences.ko: 펜: 저게… 황금 낫이구나. 자유를 여는 도구야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: A solid metal took in Gaia's sorrow and turned into light.
sentences.ko: 펜: 단단한 광물이 가이아의 슬픔을 받아 빛이 되었구나.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: It's really shining. Who could possibly lift it?
sentences.ko: 이리: 정말 빛나요. 누가 저걸 들 수 있을까요?
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: It looks heavy… and warm.
sentences.ko: 하라: 무겁고… 따뜻해 보여.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: My children, will any of you help your mother?
sentences.ko: 가이아: 내 아이들아, 누가 어머니를 도와주겠니?
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother, I have to guard the sea.
sentences.ko: 오케아노스: 어머니, 저는 바다를 지켜야 해요.
sentences.speaker: Oceanus

sentences.text: I have to guard the path of light.
sentences.ko: 히페리온: 저는 빛의 길을 지켜야 합니다.
sentences.speaker: Hyperion

sentences.text: Mother, I… I'm not sure I can.
sentences.ko: 코이오스: 어머니, 저는… 자신이 없어요.
sentences.speaker: Coeus

sentences.text: Father's eyes frighten me.
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 아버지의 눈빛이 무서워요.
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: I'm sorry, Mother…
sentences.ko: 크리오스: 죄송해요, 어머니…
sentences.speaker: Crius

sentences.text: Cronus…
sentences.ko: 가이아: 크로노스…
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: I'm sorry to ask this of you, the youngest of all.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 가장 어린 너에게 묻기는 미안하구나.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother…
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니…
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: You said my brothers are crying down in the depths.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 형들이 깊은 곳에서 울고 있다고 하셨죠.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: I'll try.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 제가 해 볼게요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: The youngest… his hands are trembling, but his gaze is steady.
sentences.ko: 이리: 막내가… 손이 떨리는데도 눈은 안 떨려.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Mother, I'll go for the sake of my brothers.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니, 형제들을 위해 제가 가겠습니다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: I'll wake my brothers in the depths.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 깊은 곳의 형들을 깨우겠습니다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Thank you, Cronus.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 고맙다, 크로노스.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: I'm laying a great promise upon your small shoulders.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 너의 작은 어깨에 큰 약속을 얹는구나.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: This is the moment a young branch becomes the firmest root.
sentences.ko: 펜: 어린 가지가 가장 단단한 뿌리가 되는 순간이구나.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: The youngest took up the tool of freedom.
sentences.ko: 막내가 자유의 도구를 받아 들었다.

sentences.text: This sickle will be heavy — on your heart and on your hands.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 이 낫은 무거울 거야. 마음도, 손도.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: But it can wake your brothers from their sleep.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 하지만 형제들의 잠을 깨울 수 있단다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother, I give you my promise.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니, 약속드릴게요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: That night, the first hero in mythology stood holding the golden sickle.
sentences.ko: 그날 밤, 신화의 첫 영웅이 황금 낫을 들고 섰다.

sentences.text: Mother, I'll set my brothers free.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니, 형제들을 자유롭게 할게요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: I'll bring the light back to the depths once more.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 깊은 곳의 빛을 다시 열겠습니다.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Pen… the youngest's back looks bigger and bigger now.
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜… 막내의 등이 점점 커 보여.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Resolve is what makes the shoulders grow, Hara.
sentences.ko: 펜: 결심이 어깨를 키우는 거란다, 하라.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: My children, let me tell you why I called you.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 아이들아, 너희를 부른 까닭을 말하마.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Your brothers… are still trapped down in the depths.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 너희 형제들이… 아직도 깊은 곳에 갇혀 있다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother, what are you planning?
sentences.ko: 오케아노스: 어머니, 무슨 일을 꾸미시는 거예요?
sentences.speaker: Oceanus

sentences.text: One is enough. With the courage of one, everyone is set free.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 한 사람이면 된다. 한 사람의 용기면, 모두가 풀려난다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: This is the hard metal I nurtured deep within myself.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 이건 내 깊은 곳에서 키운 단단한 금이다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: It's not a weapon to swing, but a token for engraving a promise.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 휘두르는 무기가 아니라, 약속을 새기는 표식이지.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother, that light is…
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 어머니, 그 빛은…
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: It's a metal I've never seen before.
sentences.ko: 코이오스: 처음 보는 금속이에요.
sentences.speaker: Coeus

sentences.text: Mother, I… I can't do it.
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 어머니, 저는… 못 합니다.
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: Father's sky is too vast and too heavy.
sentences.ko: 크리오스: 아버지의 하늘이 너무 크고 너무 무거워요.
sentences.speaker: Crius

sentences.text: One wrong step, and all of us might vanish.
sentences.ko: 휘페리온: 한 발만 잘못 디뎌도 우리 모두가 사라질지도 몰라요.
sentences.speaker: Hyperion

sentences.text: I'll guard the waterways. But that one task… please, anything but that.
sentences.ko: 오케아노스: 저는 물길을 지킬게요. 하지만 그 일만은… 부디.
sentences.speaker: Oceanus

sentences.text: Mother, please find us another way.
sentences.ko: 코이오스: 어머니, 다른 길을 찾아 주세요.
sentences.speaker: Coeus

sentences.text: It was the youngest who reached out his hand first.
sentences.ko: 가장 어린 자가 가장 먼저 손을 내밀었다.

sentences.text: Mother, I'll lift it.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니, 제가 들겠어요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Cronus, you're the youngest!
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 크로노스, 너 막내잖아!
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: Because I'm the youngest, I haven't learned much fear yet.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 막내라서, 아직 두려움을 덜 배웠어요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: …Are you certain, my youngest?
sentences.ko: 가이아: …정말이냐, 내 막내야.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Pen, is it really all right for this to happen…
sentences.ko: 하라: 펜, 정말 이래도 되는 걸까요…
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: It feels like young Cronus is taking on far too heavy a burden.
sentences.ko: 하라: 어린 크로노스가 너무 큰 짐을 지는 것 같아요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Well, in the myth this path is already set.
sentences.ko: 이리: 음, 신화에서는 이미 정해진 길이야.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Our part is just to watch from the side, to the very end.
sentences.ko: 이리: 우리는 옆에서 끝까지 봐 주는 거지.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: …To the very end?
sentences.ko: 하라: …끝까지요?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Hara, a record is memory, and memory is freedom.
sentences.ko: 펜: 하라, 기록은 곧 기억이고, 기억은 곧 자유란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: If we forget this story, Gaia's tears and Cronus's courage will vanish too.
sentences.ko: 펜: 우리가 이 이야기를 잊으면 가이아의 눈물도, 크로노스의 용기도 사라지지.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Not forgetting — that is the one thing we can do.
sentences.ko: 펜: 잊지 않는 것, 그것이 우리가 할 수 있는 일이야.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: …I understand, Pen. I'll watch until the end.
sentences.ko: 하라: …알겠어요, 펜. 끝까지 지켜볼게요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Cronus, this sickle is not a tool to swing.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 크로노스, 이 낫은 휘두르는 도구가 아니다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: It's the key to freedom for your trapped brothers.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 갇힌 형제들에게 가는 자유의 열쇠란다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother… it's heavy.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니… 무겁네요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: That weight is the weight of a promise. Can you bear it?
sentences.ko: 가이아: 무게는 약속의 무게란다. 견딜 수 있겠느냐.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: …I'll try to bear it.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: …견뎌 볼게요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Promise me, my youngest.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 약속해 다오, 막내야.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: That once you've freed your brothers, you must never lock them away again.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 형제들을 풀어 준 뒤에는, 너 또한 그들을 다시 가두지 않겠다고.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: …I won't lock them away again.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: …다시 가두지 않을게요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Say it clearly, one more time.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 한 번 더, 또렷이.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: I'll keep my brothers free, Mother.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 형제들을 자유롭게 두겠어요, 어머니.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Within that light, the first promise was engraved between the mother and her youngest son.
sentences.ko: 그 빛 속에서, 어머니와 막내 사이에 첫 약속이 새겨졌다.

sentences.text: Even those who hung back in fear watched the youngest one's retreating back.
sentences.ko: 두려움 뒤에 남은 자들도, 막내의 등을 보았다.

sentences.text: The youngest… took up the burden in our place.
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 막내가… 우리를 대신해 짊어졌어.
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: We should be ashamed of ourselves.
sentences.ko: 오케아노스: 부끄럽구나, 우리는.
sentences.speaker: Oceanus

sentences.text: Cronus, we'll walk that road alongside you.
sentences.ko: 코이오스: 크로노스, 네가 가는 길에 우리도 함께 서마.
sentences.speaker: Coeus

sentences.text: Even if we can't carry the light, we'll bear the shadows.
sentences.ko: 휘페리온: 빛은 못 들어도, 그림자는 받아 주마.
sentences.speaker: Hyperion

sentences.text: Go safely, my youngest.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 잘 가거라, 내 막내야.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Until you return, I will wait for you here in this cave.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 네가 돌아올 때까지, 나는 이 동굴에서 너를 기다린다.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Mother, I'll be sure to come back.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니, 꼭 돌아올게요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Don't forget your promise.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 약속, 잊지 말거라.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: I won't forget.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 잊지 않아요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Another page has returned!
sentences.ko: 펜: 또 한 페이지가 돌아왔구나!
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: When a promise is engraved, a forgotten star returns to its place.
sentences.ko: 펜: 약속이 새겨지면, 잊혀진 별이 제자리로 돌아온단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Wow, one more star must have risen in Gimje's night sky too!
sentences.ko: 이리: 와아, 김제 밤하늘에도 별 하나 더 떴겠는걸요!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: …I'm so relieved.
sentences.ko: 하라: …다행이에요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The mother's tears flowed with both sorrow and relief.
sentences.ko: 어머니의 눈물은 슬픔과 안도가 함께 흘렀다.

sentences.text: My youngest, I wonder if I've laid too heavy a burden on you.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 막내야, 너에게 너무 무거운 짐을 지운 건 아닐까.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Please, don't forget your promise.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 부디 약속을 잊지 말아 다오.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Cronus, let me ask you one thing.
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 크로노스, 한 가지 묻자.
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: When our trapped brothers are freed… they'll be stronger than us.
sentences.ko: 코이오스: 갇힌 형제들이 풀려나면… 그들은 우리보다 강할 거야.
sentences.speaker: Coeus

sentences.text: Mother's promise — will you really keep it to the very end?
sentences.ko: 이아페토스: 어머니의 약속, 정말 끝까지 지킬 거니?
sentences.speaker: Iapetus

sentences.text: …Brothers, please don't say that right now.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: …형들, 지금은 그 말 하지 말아 줘요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Today, I only want to think about the promise.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 오늘은 약속만 생각할래요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: One promise is engraved, and an age slowly awakens. But upon young shoulders, the weight of that promise was laid as well.
sentences.ko: 한 약속이 새겨지고, 한 시대가 천천히 깨어난다. 그러나 어린 어깨 위에는, 약속의 무게도 함께 얹혔다.

sentences.text: Mother, I'll keep my promise.
sentences.ko: 크로노스: 어머니, 약속은 지킬게요.
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: …I'll be able to, won't I?
sentences.ko: 크로노스: …지킬 수 있겠죠?
sentences.speaker: Cronus

sentences.text: Cronus…
sentences.ko: 가이아: 크로노스…
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: The story of the first age has finally all returned to its place.
sentences.ko: 펜: 첫 시대의 이야기가, 마침내 모두 제자리로 돌아왔어.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Really? From Chaos all the way to the golden sickle, without missing a single line?
sentences.ko: 하라: 정말? 카오스부터 황금 낫까지, 한 줄도 빠지지 않고?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Not a single letter is missing. The stars are singing inside the book.
sentences.ko: 펜: 한 글자도 빠뜨리지 않았단다. 별이 책 속에서 노래하는구나.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Wow, there's a whole universe inside the book!
sentences.ko: 이리: 와, 책 안에 우주가 통째로 들어가 있어!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: It really is. Every time I turn a page, a star twinkles.
sentences.ko: 하라: 정말이네. 페이지를 넘길 때마다 별이 반짝거려.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: All right, the road is open! It's time to head back to Gimje.
sentences.ko: 이리: 자, 길이 열렸어! 김제로 돌아갈 시간이야.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The rainbow has appeared again. The light is so warm.
sentences.ko: 하라: 무지개가 다시 나타났어. 빛이 너무 따뜻해.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The book is calling us. Quick, let's step onto the path.
sentences.ko: 펜: 책이 우리를 부르고 있어. 어서 길 위로 올라타자.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: The first story of the gods ends not with a farewell, but with a promise.
sentences.ko: 신화 속 신들의 첫 이야기는, 작별이 아니라 약속으로 끝난다.

sentences.text: Farewell, my children. Let us meet again next time.
sentences.ko: 가이아: 잘 가렴, 아이들아. 다음에 또 만나자꾸나.
sentences.speaker: Gaia

sentences.text: Lady Gaia, I'll come back again. I promise!
sentences.ko: 하라: 가이아 님, 또 올게요. 꼭이요!
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Goodbye to the sleeping giants too! When you wake, tell us your story.
sentences.ko: 이리: 잠든 거인들에게도 안녕! 깨어나면 우리 얘기 들려줘요.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Gaia's love is as deep as the universe. Even a farewell is one page of love.
sentences.ko: 펜: 가이아의 사랑은 우주만큼 깊어. 작별도 사랑의 한 페이지란다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: What kind of gods will be waiting for us next time?
sentences.ko: 하라: 다음엔 어떤 신들이 우리를 기다리고 있을까?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Soon the age of the twelve Titans and Zeus will begin.
sentences.ko: 펜: 곧 열두 티탄과 제우스의 시대가 열린단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Which means the gods are about to get a whole lot louder!
sentences.ko: 이리: 그 말은, 신들이 훨씬 더 시끄러워진다는 뜻이지!
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Loud is fine by me. This adventure was truly wonderful too.
sentences.ko: 하라: 시끄러워도 좋아. 이번 모험도 정말 멋졌으니까.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The golden sickle is waiting on the next page. Steel your heart.
sentences.ko: 펜: 다음 페이지엔 황금 낫이 기다리고 있어. 마음을 단단히 먹으렴.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: We're back. It's really the same cave we left.
sentences.ko: 하라: 돌아왔어. 정말 우리가 떠났던 그 동굴이야.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The rainbow road plays with time in a fun way. For you it's a single moment, but for us it's an eternity.
sentences.ko: 이리: 무지개 길은 시간을 재미있게 다루지. 너희에겐 한순간이지만, 우리에겐 영원이란다.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: Time was folded up inside the book. One page is as long as an entire age.
sentences.ko: 펜: 시간이 책 속에서 접혀 있었던 거야. 한 페이지가 한 시대만큼 길단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: So Gimje is exactly as it was at dawn on the day we left?
sentences.ko: 하라: 그럼 김제는 우리가 떠난 그날 새벽 그대로네?
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: That's right. The stars waited for us.
sentences.ko: 이리: 그렇지. 별이 우리를 기다려 줬어.
sentences.speaker: Iri

sentences.text: The stars in Gimje's night sky had all returned to their places.
sentences.ko: 김제 밤하늘의 별이, 모두 제자리로 돌아왔다.

sentences.text: The Baekje constellation ceiling painting, too, returned to its place along with the stars.
sentences.ko: 백제 별자리 천장화도, 별과 함께 제자리로 돌아왔다.

sentences.text: Goodness, all the constellations have come back at once. Even the conservation team can't explain why.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 세상에, 별자리가 한꺼번에 다 돌아왔어요. 보존팀도 이유를 모르겠다고 합니다.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: In the very spots that were empty just last night, the Baekje stars are set in place once more.
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 어젯밤만 해도 비어 있던 자리에, 백제의 별이 그대로 박혀 있네요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: It's truly remarkable. Who could have brought these stars back?
sentences.ko: 김 선생: 정말 신기한 일입니다. 누가 이 별들을 다시 데려온 걸까요.
sentences.speaker: Ms. Kim

sentences.text: Both the Korean constellations and the Greek ones were made by people who looked up at the same sky.
sentences.ko: 한국의 별자리도, 그리스의 별자리도, 같은 하늘을 본 사람들이 만들었다.

sentences.text: Hara, were the constellations in Greek myth real, way back in the old days too?
sentences.ko: 친구: 하라야, 그리스 신화에 나오는 별자리도 옛날부터 진짜로 있었던 거야?
sentences.speaker: Classmate

sentences.text: Yeah. It started with Chaos, and there were Gaia and Uranus and so many gods.
sentences.ko: 하라: 응. 카오스에서 시작해서, 가이아랑 우라노스랑, 정말 많은 신들이 있었어.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: How do you know all that so well? Did you read it in a book?
sentences.ko: 친구: 너 어떻게 그렇게 잘 알아? 책에서 본 거야?
sentences.speaker: Classmate

sentences.text: Hmm, that's a secret. Maybe someday you'll find out too.
sentences.ko: 하라: 음, 그건 비밀이야. 언젠가 너희도 알게 될지도 몰라.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Now that you say it's a secret, I'm even more curious!
sentences.ko: 친구: 비밀이라니까 더 궁금하잖아!
sentences.speaker: Classmate

sentences.text: Hwanin fathered Hwanung, and Hwanung fathered Dangun. That's the first story of our Korean peninsula.
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 환인이 환웅을 낳았고, 환웅이 단군을 낳았지야. 우리 한반도의 첫 이야기란다.
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: In Greece, Chaos gave birth to Gaia, Gaia to Uranus, and Uranus to the twelve Titans.
sentences.ko: 하라: 그리스에선 카오스가 가이아를 낳고, 가이아가 우라노스를 낳고, 우라노스가 열두 티탄을 낳았지.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The beginnings are different, but the flow is so similar.
sentences.ko: 하라: 시작은 달라도, 흐름이 참 비슷해.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Hara, dear, what are you thinking about so deeply?
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 우리 하라, 뭔 생각을 그리 깊게 하니야?
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: Grandpa, I think people long ago looked at the same sky and made similar stories.
sentences.ko: 하라: 할아버지, 옛날 사람들은 같은 하늘을 보고 비슷한 이야기를 만든 것 같아요.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: Ha ha, when did my granddaughter grow up to have such big thoughts?
sentences.ko: 할아버지: 허허, 우리 손녀가 어느새 이렇게 큰 생각을 다 하는구나.
sentences.speaker: Grandfather

sentences.text: And so, the age of Cronus begins.
sentences.ko: 그리고, 크로노스의 시대가 시작된다.

sentences.text: Hara, the next page is calling you.
sentences.ko: 펜: 하라, 다음 페이지가 너를 부르고 있어.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Already? I've only just gotten all the stars back.
sentences.ko: 하라: 벌써? 별을 겨우 다 돌려놓은 참인데.
sentences.speaker: Hara

sentences.text: The golden sickle has awakened. The age of Cronus is about to open its doors.
sentences.ko: 펜: 황금 낫이 깨어났어. 크로노스의 시대가 곧 문을 연단다.
sentences.speaker: Pen

sentences.text: Okay. See you again soon, Pen.
sentences.ko: 하라: 그래. 곧 또 보자, 펜.
sentences.speaker: Hara
